findings.title: Ivanti EPMM Zero-Days Under Mass Exploitation
findings.summary: Two critical RCE zero-days exploited since July 2025; single threat actor responsible for 83% of attacks.

findings.title: Dell RecoverPoint for VMs — Hardcoded Credentials Under Active Exploitation
findings.summary: Hardcoded credentials allow unauthenticated remote root access; Chinese APT exploitation since mid-2024.

findings.title: VSCode Extensions with 128M+ Downloads Contain Critical Flaws
findings.summary: High-to-critical flaws in popular VSCode extensions allow file theft and RCE on developer workstations.

findings.title: CISA KEV: Zimbra SSRF and GitLab SSRF Added
findings.summary: Older SSRF vulns in Zimbra and GitLab now confirmed exploited in the wild; GitLab targeted by ~400 IPs.

noted.summary: Sophisticated malware embedded in firmware from multiple device brands. Mobile-only.
Poland arrests suspect under Operation Aether.
